```{r scorecard_new, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
              "Medicaid Home and Community-Based Services (HCBS) and affordable housing programs."
            ),
            tags$li(
              style = "margin-bottom:0.5rem;",
              tags$strong("Community Participation"), " — captures access to the tools and ",
              "systems that enable people with disabilities to participate fully in community life, ",
              "including technology access, health insurance coverage, educational attainment, ",
              "transportation options, and public safety."
            ),
            tags$li(
              style = "margin-bottom:0;",
              tags$strong("Work & Economic"), " — measures economic inclusion and security, ",
              "including employment rates, cost-of-living-adjusted income, poverty and ",
              "unemployment rates, and housing affordability for people with disabilities."
            )
          ),
          tags$p(
            style = "font-size:1.2rem;color:#1c2b3a;line-height:1.75;margin:0 0 0.9rem;",
            "Within each domain, individual indicators are standardized using z-scores and ",
            "combined into sub-index scores, which are then aggregated into a single domain ",
            "score. States are ranked among all 50 states, Washington D.C., and Puerto Rico, ",
            "and assigned a performance tier: ",
            tags$strong("Excellent"), " (ranks 1–12), ",
            tags$strong("Above Average"), " (13–25), ",
            tags$strong("Below Average"), " (26–39), or ",
            tags$strong("Poor"), " (40+)."
          ),
          tags$p(
            style = "font-size:1.2rem;color:#1c2b3a;line-height:1.75;margin:0;",
            "The ADA-PARC Scorecard is produced with the intention of informing policymakers, advocates, and the ",
            "public about the state of disability inclusion across the country, and to highlight ",
            "the states leading the way, as well as those with the most room to improve."
          )
        ),
        source_table
      )
    )
  )
)

# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# SERVER
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
server <- function(input, output, session) {

  state_rendered <- reactiveVal(FALSE)
  cat_rendered   <- reactiveVal(FALSE)

  shinyjs::disable("download_state")
  shinyjs::disable("download_cat")

  placeholder <- function(msg) {
    div(class = "placeholder-box",
        tags$span(class = "ph-icon", HTML("&#9634;")),
        msg)
  }

  # ── STATE SCORECARD ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  observeEvent(input$render_state, {

    state_rendered(FALSE)
    shinyjs::disable("download_state")

    state_label <- names(state_choices)[state_choices == input$state_abbr]

    withProgress(
      message = paste0("Generating scorecard for ", state_label, "\u2026"),
      detail  = "This usually takes 15\u201325 seconds.",
      value   = 0.15,
      {
        tryCatch({
          quarto::quarto_render(
            input          = file.path(scorecard_dir, "state_scorecard.qmd"),
            execute_params = list(state_abbr = input$state_abbr, year = 2024),
            execute_dir    = scorecard_dir
          )
          file.copy(
            file.path(scorecard_dir, "state_scorecard.html"),
            file.path(www_dir, "state_output.html"),
            overwrite = TRUE
          )
          setProgress(1)
          state_rendered(TRUE)
          shinyjs::enable("download_state")
        }, error = function(e) {
          showNotification(
            ui       = paste("Render failed:", conditionMessage(e)),
            type     = "error",
            duration = 15
          )
        })
      }
    )
  })

  output$state_output_ui <- renderUI({
    if (!state_rendered()) {
      placeholder("Select a state above and click \u201cGenerate Scorecard\u201d to view the report.")
    } else {
      cache_v     <- as.integer(Sys.time())
      state_label <- names(state_choices)[state_choices == input$state_abbr]
      tags$iframe(
        src       = paste0("sc_out/state_output.html?v=", cache_v),
        class     = "scorecard-frame",
        height    = "940px",
        scrolling = "yes",
        title     = paste0(state_label, " ADA-PARC State Scorecard")
      )
    }
  })

  output$download_state <- downloadHandler(
    filename = function() {
      state_label <- names(state_choices)[state_choices == input$state_abbr]
      paste0("ADAPARC_", gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9]+", "_", state_label),
             "_Scorecard_2024.html")
    },
    content = function(file) {
      if (file.exists(file.path(www_dir, "state_output.html"))) {
        file.copy(file.path(www_dir, "state_output.html"), file)
      } else {
        writeLines("<html><body>No scorecard generated yet.</body></html>", file)
      }
    }
  )

  # ── CATEGORY SCORECARD ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  observeEvent(input$render_cat, {

    cat_rendered(FALSE)
    shinyjs::disable("download_cat")

    cat_label <- names(cat_choices)[cat_choices == input$category]

    withProgress(
      message = paste0("Generating ", cat_label, " scorecard\u2026"),
      detail  = "This usually takes 15\u201325 seconds.",
      value   = 0.15,
      {
        tryCatch({
          quarto::quarto_render(
            input          = file.path(scorecard_dir, "category_scorecard.qmd"),
            execute_params = list(category = input$category, year = 2024),
            execute_dir    = scorecard_dir
          )
          file.copy(
            file.path(scorecard_dir, "category_scorecard.html"),
            file.path(www_dir, "cat_output.html"),
            overwrite = TRUE
          )
          setProgress(1)
          cat_rendered(TRUE)
          shinyjs::enable("download_cat")
        }, error = function(e) {
          showNotification(
            ui       = paste("Render failed:", conditionMessage(e)),
            type     = "error",
            duration = 15
          )
        })
      }
    )
  })

  output$cat_output_ui <- renderUI({
    if (!cat_rendered()) {
      placeholder("Select a category above and click \u201cGenerate Scorecard\u201d to view the report.")
    } else {
      cache_v   <- as.integer(Sys.time())
      cat_label <- names(cat_choices)[cat_choices == input$category]
      tags$iframe(
        src       = paste0("sc_out/cat_output.html?v=", cache_v),
        class     = "scorecard-frame",
        height    = "1080px",
        scrolling = "yes",
        title     = paste0(cat_label, " ADA-PARC Category Scorecard")
      )
    }
  })

  output$download_cat <- downloadHandler(
    filename = function() {
      cat_label <- names(cat_choices)[cat_choices == input$category]
      paste0("ADAPARC_", gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9]+", "_", cat_label),
             "_Scorecard_2024.html")
    },
    content = function(file) {
      if (file.exists(file.path(www_dir, "cat_output.html"))) {
        file.copy(file.path(www_dir, "cat_output.html"), file)
      } else {
        writeLines("<html><body>No scorecard generated yet.</body></html>", file)
      }
    }
  )

}

shinyApp(ui = ui, server = server)
```

# Fact Sheets

```{r fact_sheets_html, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(shiny)
library(htmltools)

# Serve the factsheets/ directory so HTML files are reachable in the browser
shiny::addResourcePath("factsheets", normalizePath("factsheets", mustWork = TRUE))

# Fact sheet metadata — title, subtitle, description, and filename
fact_sheets <- list(
  list(
    id       = "housing",
    title    = "Access to Housing",
    subtitle = "Community Living for People with Disabilities",
    desc     = "Examines access to Public Housing and Housing Choice Voucher programs for people with disabilities, with state-by-state rankings and interactive maps.",
    file     = "factsheet-housing.html"
  ),
  list(
    id       = "hcbs",
    title    = "State HCBS Spending",
    subtitle = "Home and Community-Based Services",
    desc     = "Compares state Medicaid spending on Home and Community-Based Services that support people with disabilities in living in the community.",
    file     = "factsheet-hcbs.html"
  ),
  list(
    id       = "nursing-home",
    title    = "Nursing Home Rates",
    subtitle = "Institutionalization Ages 18 to 64",
    desc     = "Shows rates of nursing home institutionalization among working-age people with disabilities across all 50 states, with tier-based rankings.",
    file     = "factsheet-nursing-home.html"
  ),
  list(
    id       = "poverty",
    title    = "Poverty Rates",
    subtitle = "Working-Age People with Disabilities",
    desc     = "Compares poverty rates between people with and without disabilities of working age, highlighting state-level disparities across the country.",
    file     = "factsheet-poverty.html"
  )
)

ui <- fluidPage(
  tags$head(
    tags$link(rel = "preconnect", href = "https://fonts.googleapis.com"),
    tags$link(
      rel  = "stylesheet",
      href = "https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=EB+Garamond:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;0,700;1,400&display=swap"
    ),
    tags$style(HTML("
      body {
        font-family: 'EB Garamond', Garamond, Georgia, serif;
        background: #f9f7f4;
        margin: 0;
      }
      .fs-page {
        max-width: 960px;
        margin: 0 auto;
        padding: 1.75rem 1.25rem 2.5rem;
      }
      .fs-heading {
        font-size: 1.7rem;
        font-weight: 700;
        color: #6b0f0f;
        margin: 0 0 0.3rem;
        border-left: 4px solid #c8a743;
        padding-left: 0.65rem;
      }
      .fs-subheading {
        font-size: 1.05rem;
        color: #444;
        margin: 0 0 1.75rem 0;
        padding-left: 0.65rem;
        line-height: 1.55;
      }
      .fs-grid {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(240px, 1fr));
        gap: 1.25rem;
        margin-bottom: 2rem;
      }
      .fs-card {
        background: #fff;
        border: 1px solid #e0dbd2;
        border-top: 4px solid #6b0f0f;
        border-radius: 4px;
        padding: 1.4rem 1.3rem 1.2rem;
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        box-shadow: 0 1px 5px rgba(0,0,0,0.06);
        transition: box-shadow 0.15s;
      }
      .fs-card:hover {
        box-shadow: 0 3px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
      }
      .fs-card-subtitle {
        font-size: 0.95rem;
        font-weight: 700;
        color: #6b0f0f;
        text-transform: uppercase;
        letter-spacing: 0.05em;
        margin: 0 0 0.35rem;
      }
      .fs-card-title {
        font-size: 1.2rem;
        font-weight: 700;
        color: #1c1c1c;
        margin: 0 0 0.6rem;
      }
      .fs-card-desc {
        font-size: 1.05rem;
        color: #444;
        line-height: 1.6;
        flex-grow: 1;
        margin-bottom: 1.1rem;
      }
      .fs-btn-row {
        display: flex;
        gap: 0.5rem;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
      }
      .fs-btn-view {
        flex: 1;
        min-width: 70px;
        background: #6b0f0f;
        color: #fff !important;
        border: none;
        border-radius: 3px;
        padding: 0.45rem 0.7rem;
        font-family: 'EB Garamond', Garamond, Georgia, serif;
        font-size: 1rem;
        font-weight: 600;
        cursor: pointer;
        text-align: center;
        transition: background 0.15s;
        text-decoration: none;
        display: inline-block;
        line-height: 1.4;
      }
      .fs-btn-view:hover, .fs-btn-view:focus {
        background: #8c1515;
        color: #fff !important;
        text-decoration: none;
        outline: 2px solid #c8a743;
        outline-offset: 2px;
      }
      .fs-btn-view.active {
        background: #c8a743;
        color: #1c1c1c !important;
      }
      .fs-btn-dl {
        flex: 1;
        min-width: 70px;
        background: #fff;
        color: #6b0f0f !important;
        border: 1.5px solid #6b0f0f;
        border-radius: 3px;
        padding: 0.45rem 0.7rem;
        font-family: 'EB Garamond', Garamond, Georgia, serif;
        font-size: 1rem;
        font-weight: 600;
        cursor: pointer;
        text-align: center;
        transition: background 0.15s;
        text-decoration: none;
        display: inline-block;
        line-height: 1.4;
      }
      .fs-btn-dl:hover, .fs-btn-dl:focus {
        background: #fdf5f5;
        color: #6b0f0f !important;
        text-decoration: none;
        outline: 2px solid #c8a743;
        outline-offset: 2px;
      }
      .fs-preview-wrap {
        border: 1px solid #e0dbd2;
        border-radius: 4px;
        overflow: hidden;
        background: #fff;
        box-shadow: 0 1px 5px rgba(0,0,0,0.06);
      }
      .fs-preview-bar {
        background: #1c1c1c;
        color: #fff;
        padding: 0.55rem 1rem;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: space-between;
        font-size: 1rem;
        gap: 1rem;
      }
      .fs-preview-bar span {
        font-weight: 600;
        color: #e8e8e8;
      }
      .fs-preview-bar a {
        color: #c8a743;
        font-weight: 600;
        text-decoration: none;
        white-space: nowrap;
        flex-shrink: 0;
      }
      .fs-preview-bar a:hover {
        text-decoration: underline;
      }
      #fs_frame {
        width: 100%;
        height: 78vh;
        border: none;
        display: none;
      }
      .fs-empty {
        height: 220px;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        color: #595959;
        font-size: 1.05rem;
        background: #fafaf8;
        font-style: italic;
      }
    "))
  ),

  div(class = "fs-page",

    h2(class = "fs-heading", "ADA-PARC Fact Sheets"),
    p(class = "fs-subheading",
      "Accessible, interactive fact sheets on disability community living indicators. ",
      "Select any fact sheet to preview it below, or download the HTML file directly."
    ),

    # Card grid
    div(class = "fs-grid",
      lapply(fact_sheets, function(fs) {
        div(class = "fs-card",
          p(class = "fs-card-subtitle", fs$subtitle),
          h3(class = "fs-card-title", fs$title),
          p(class = "fs-card-desc", fs$desc),
          div(class = "fs-btn-row",
            tags$button(
              class   = "fs-btn-view",
              id      = paste0("view_", fs$id),
              onclick = paste0("loadFS('", fs$file, "', '", fs$title, "', this)"),
              "View"
            ),
            tags$a(
              class    = "fs-btn-dl",
              href     = paste0("factsheets/", fs$file),
              download = fs$file,
              "Download"
            )
          )
        )
      })
    ),

    # Preview pane
    div(class = "fs-preview-wrap",
      div(class = "fs-preview-bar",
        tags$span(id = "fs_current_title", "Select a fact sheet above to preview it here"),
        tags$a(
          id     = "fs_open_new",
          href   = "#",
          target = "_blank",
          rel    = "noopener",
          style  = "display:none",
          "Open in new tab \u2197"
        )
      ),
      tags$iframe(
        id      = "fs_frame",
        src     = "",
        title   = "Fact Sheet viewer",
        tabindex = "0"
      ),
      div(id = "fs_empty", class = "fs-empty",
        "Select a fact sheet above to preview it here."
      )
    )

  ), # end .fs-page

  # Vanilla JS — no Shiny messages needed
  tags$script(HTML("
    function loadFS(file, title, btn) {
      var frame    = document.getElementById('fs_frame');
      var empty    = document.getElementById('fs_empty');
      var label    = document.getElementById('fs_current_title');
      var openLink = document.getElementById('fs_open_new');
      var url      = 'factsheets/' + file;

      // Update active button highlight
      document.querySelectorAll('.fs-btn-view').forEach(function(b) {
        b.classList.remove('active');
      });
      btn.classList.add('active');

      // Load in iframe
      frame.src          = url;
      frame.style.display = 'block';
      empty.style.display = 'none';

      // Update bar
      label.textContent  = title;
      openLink.href      = url;
      openLink.style.display = 'inline';
    }
  "))
)

server <- function(input, output, session) {}
shinyApp(ui = ui, server = server)
```

# Help

```{r accessibility-page-body}
library(shiny)
library(htmltools)

# Help page styles
tags$style(HTML("
  /* ── Help page layout ───────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .help-wrap {
    max-width: 680px;
    margin: 2.5rem auto;
    padding: 0 1.5rem 3rem 1.5rem;
    font-family: 'EB Garamond', Garamond, Georgia, serif !important;
  }

  /* ── Page heading ───────────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .help-heading {
    font-family: 'EB Garamond', Garamond, Georgia, serif !important;
    font-size: 3rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #1c2b3a;
    margin: 0 0 0.25rem 0;
    padding-bottom: 0.5rem;
    border-bottom: 2px solid #c8a743;
    letter-spacing: -0.01em;
  }

  .help-subheading {
    font-family: 'EB Garamond', Garamond, Georgia, serif !important;
    font-size: 1.6rem;
    color: #252930;
    font-style: italic;
    margin: 0 0 2rem 0;
  }

  /* ── Section cards ──────────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .help-card {
    background: #ffffff;
    border: 1px solid #e4e8ef;
    border-radius: 4px;
    padding: 1.5rem 1.75rem;
    margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
  }

  .help-card-title {
    font-family: 'EB Garamond', Garamond, Georgia, serif !important;
    font-size: 3rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #591313;
    margin: 0 0 0.6rem 0;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    font-size: 1.25rem;
  }

  .help-card p {
    font-family: 'EB Garamond', Garamond, Georgia, serif !important;
    font-size: 1.4rem;
    color: #1c2b3a;
    line-height: 1.75;
    margin: 0 0 1rem 0;
  }

  /* ── Palette selector within card ──────────────────────────────── */
  .help-card .control-label,
  .help-card label,
  .help-card h4 {
    font-family: 'EB Garamond', Garamond, Georgia, serif !important;
    font-size: 1.4rem !important;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: #1c2b3a;
    margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
  }

  .help-card .form-control,
  .help-card .selectize-input,
  .help-card .selectize-dropdown {
    font-family: 'EB Garamond', Garamond, Georgia, serif !important;
    font-size: 1.6rem;
    border-color: #d0d7e2;
  }

  .help-card .selectize-input.focus {
    border-color: #c8a743 !important;
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(200, 167, 67, 0.2) !important;
  }

  .help-palette-note {
    font-family: 'EB Garamond', Garamond, Georgia, serif !important;
    font-size: 1.6rem;
    color: #4a5568;
    font-style: italic;
    margin-top: 0.6rem;
    margin-bottom: 0;
  }
"))

# Help page content
div(class = "help-wrap",

  # Page title
  tags$h1("Help", class = "help-heading"),
  tags$p("Resources and settings for the ADA-PARC Data Tool.", class = "help-subheading"),

  # Contact card
  div(class = "help-card",
    tags$p(class = "help-card-title", "Contact"),
    tags$p(
      "For questions about the data, methodology, or site functionality, please reach out to our team."
    ),
    tags$a(
      href  = "mailto:joyhammel@uic.edu",
      class = "email-button",
      "Contact Us"
    )
  ),

  # Map settings card
  div(class = "help-card",
    tags$p(class = "help-card-title", "Map Display Settings"),
    {
      ada_parc_colors <- c("#f7e49c", "#fa8e57", "#c41306", "#630801")
      ada_parc_palette <- colorRampPalette(ada_parc_colors)

      access_map_palette_choices <<- list(
        "ADA-PARC"              = ada_parc_palette,
        "Purple Gradient"       = "Purples",
        "Yellow-Orange-Red"     = "YlOrRd",
        "Grayscale Gradient"    = "Greys",
        "Teal-Blue Gradient"    = "GnBu",
        "Green-Yellow Gradient" = "YlGn",
        "Brown-Blue Diverging"  = "BrBG"
      )
      selectInput(
        inputId  = "access_map_palette",
        label    = "Select Map Color Palette:",
        choices  = names(access_map_palette_choices),
        selected = "ADA-PARC"
      )
    },
    tags$p(class = "help-palette-note",
      "Your selected palette applies to choropleth maps in national data, city data."
    )
  )

)

# Reactive Palette Selection (unchanged)
access_map_palette_selected <- reactive({
  access_map_palette_choices[[input$access_map_palette]]
})
```

<!-- Custom Javascript  -->

```{=html}
<script>
$("body").on("shown.bs.tab", "a[data-toggle='tab']", function(e) {
Shiny.setInputValue("active_tab", $(e.target).parent().index());
})
</script>
```
<!-- CSS for dashboard  -->

```{=html}
<style type="text/css">

/* #################### */
/* Fonts */
/* #################### */

/* Ensure Garamond on all elements (belt-and-suspenders over Yeti theme) */
body, p, div, li, a, label, span, input, select, textarea, button,
.form-control, .selectize-input, .selectize-dropdown,
.selectize-dropdown-content, .shiny-input-container {
  font-family: 'EB Garamond', Garamond, Georgia, serif !important;
}

/* Headers */
h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6 {
  font-family: 'EB Garamond', Garamond, Georgia, serif !important;
  font-weight: bold;
}

/* Section title color */
h3 {
color: #1c2b3a;
}

/* #################### */
/* Coloring */
/* #################### */

/* Leaflet legend styling with Garamond font */
.leaflet-control-container .leaflet-control {
  font-family: 'EB Garamond', Garamond, Georgia, serif !important;
}

.leaflet-control .legend {
  font-family: 'EB Garamond', Garamond, Georgia, serif !important;
  font-size: 16px !important;
}

.leaflet-control .legend div {
  font-family: 'EB Garamond', Garamond, Georgia, serif !important;
}

/* Leaflet border */
.leaflet .legend i{
border-left:1px solid #000000;
border-right:1px solid #000000;
border-top:1px solid #000000;
border-bottom:1px solid #000000;
}

/* Leaflet background */
.leaflet-container {
background: #ddd;
}

/* Section dividers */
.section-divider { 
background-color: #CCCCCC;
color: #000000;
}

/* Selector widget Active Option */
.item {
background: white !important;
color: black !important;
}
.selectize-dropdown-content .active {
background: #EFEFEF !important;
color: black !important;
border-left:1px solid #000000;
border-right:1px solid #000000;
border-top:1px solid #000000;
border-bottom:1px solid #000000;
}

/* Kable caption colors (darken to meet contrast requirements) */
caption {
color: black;
font-weight: bold;
}


/* #################### */
/* Containers */
/* #################### */

/* Set max length for dropdowns */
.selectize-dropdown-content {
padding: 10px;
}

/* Allow dropdowns to be visible for short containers */
#access_ggplot_theme+ div>.selectize-dropdown, #access_map_palette+ div>.selectize-dropdown {
position: static;
}

/* Have dropdowns display on top of Leaflet */
.selectize-dropdown {
z-index: 10000;
overflow-y: auto;
}

/* Scroll overflow for tables */
.table-wrapper {
overflow-x: scroll;
overflow-y: scroll;
}

</style>
```
